meta.title: दैनिक शब्द खेल
meta.description: Kids को प्रयास (वा कम) मा लुकेको शब्द अनुमान लगाउनुहोस्। नयाँ पजल प्रत्येक दिन उपलब्ध छ!
meta.keywords: नेपाली, पज्जल, शब्द, खेल, खेल, अनलाइन, अनलाइन, दैनिक

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Nepali. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Nepali as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Nepali. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Nepali. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Nepali. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Nepali. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Nepali. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Nepali. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.no_attempts: तपाईंले अहिलेसम्म कुनै शब्दहरू प्रयास गर्नुभएन!
text.share_challenge_win: आजको Wordle {n} प्रयासमा हल गरें। तपाईं भन्दा राम्रो गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ?
text.share_challenge_lose: आजको Wordle हल गर्न सकिनँ। तपाईं सक्नुहुन्छ?

help.title: कसरी खेल्ने
help.text_1_2: प्रत्येक अनुमान एक वैध पाँच अक्षर शब्द हुनुपर्दछ। तपाईंको अनुमान पेश गर्न प्रविष्ट गर्नुहोस् बटन थिच्नुहोस्।
help.text_1_3: तपाईंले अनुमान गरेपछि, टाइलहरूले र color ्ग परिवर्तन गर्दछ जुन तपाईंको वचनको कुन अक्षरहरू सही वा लगभग सही छन्।
help.text_2_2: शब्दमा छ, तर सहि स्थानमा छैन।
help.text_2_3: तपाईले अनुमान गर्न कोशिस गर्दै हुनुहुन्छ भन्ने शब्दमा उपस्थित छैन।
help.text_3: नयाँ शब्द प्रत्येक दिन उपलब्ध हुनेछ!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: खेल पछि परिभाषा र AI कला
ui.install_app_desc: अफलाइन खेल्नुहोस् र एप आइकन पाउनुहोस्
ui.play_more_languages: विश्वव्यापी तथ्याङ्क हेर्न थप भाषामा खेल्नुहोस्!
ui.no_games_yet: तपाईंले अझै खेल्नुभएको छैन। सुरु गर्न भाषा छान्नुहोस्!
ui.hard_desc: खुलेका संकेतहरू अर्को अनुमानमा प्रयोग गर्नुपर्छ
ui.future_word: यो शब्द अझै खेलिएको छैन। पछि आउनुहोस्!
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.homepage_languages_counting: languages and counting — more added regularly.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — and more coming soon.
